name: compact-analyzer
description: Language support for the Compact smart contract language — the community successor to the sunsetted official Compact extension.

compact-analyzer.serverPath.markdownDescription: Absolute path to a `compact-analyzer` language server binary. When set, the extension launches this binary instead of discovering or downloading one; leave blank to use the built-in acquisition (settings path, then `PATH`, then the download cache, then the pinned download). This setting is client-side only and is not sent to the server.

compact-analyzer.importSearchPath.markdownDescription: Additional directories the server searches when resolving Compact `import` statements, sent to the server as `initializationOptions.importSearchPath`. When left empty, the setting is not sent and the server falls back to the `COMPACT_PATH` environment variable.

compact-analyzer.toolchainPath.markdownDescription: Path to the Compact toolchain — either the toolchain executable itself or a directory containing it. The server refers to this as `toolchainPath` in its `initializationOptions`. When set, the server never searches `PATH` for the toolchain. If the value cannot be resolved, toolchain features are silently disabled and a single informational notice is shown.

compact-analyzer.compileOnSave.markdownDescription: Compile Compact files on save, sent to the server as `initializationOptions.compileOnSave`.

compact-analyzer.formatting.markdownDescription: Enable server-provided formatting for Compact files, sent to the server as `initializationOptions.formatting`.

compact-analyzer.trace.server.markdownDescription: Traces the communication between VS Code and the Compact language server. This setting is client-side only and is not sent to the server.
